title: Mirror Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to drain of protocol assets through mispriced tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deposits tokens into a protocol during an oracle mispricing event.

red_flags: Mispriced tokens being deposited as collateral
Drain of protocol assets during oracle mispricing
attacker_addresses: Not explicitly mentioned in the article
summary: The Mirror Protocol was exploited due to a mispriced token (LUNC) being deposited as collateral during an oracle mispricing event. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions to prevent the drain of protocol assets.
